name: designer-skill
description: Plug-and-play MCP that gives your agent UI superpowers. One install: design skill + MCP server, zero config.
author: Pythoughts Labs

interface.shortDescription: Production-grade design skill + MCP server for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Designer Skill gives your coding agent a production-grade visual design system with one install. It ships five opinionated design languages (Minimalist, Soft, High-end, Brutalist, Brand-identity), a full command playbook for iterative UI work, and a local MCP server that loads context, detects anti-patterns, and serves reference material — so your agent always works from a concrete visual direction, not guesswork.
